steps.title: Identify the key requirement
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize a similarity between the two sculptures. For any choice to accomplish this, it must reference both sculptures and identify what they share.

steps.title: Apply this to the choices
steps.content: Choice C directly names both sculptures and states their shared material—mahogany. The other three miss the mark by focusing on a single sculpture, discussing Catlett's general work, or providing biographical details. That matches choice C — C is correct.
